    ScreenManager - Class in Screen.UI
    Manages switching between different screens in the game.
    ScreenManager(Stage) - Constructor for class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Creates a ScreenManager with the given main stage.
    setActionVisible(boolean) - Method in class Screen.Game.Gamebar
    set ActionVisible button
    setActive(boolean) - Method in class Item.BaseItem
    set this item is active
    setBasePlayer(BasePlayer) - Static method in class Logic.GameSession
    set BasePlayer and set round of this game
    setCategory(Category) - Method in class Item.BaseItem
    set item Category
    setEducation(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set Education value if education more than 200 set this to 200
    setHappiness(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set Happiness value if happiness more than 500 set this to 500 and if happiness less than 0 set this to 0
    setHealth(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set Health value if Health is more than 200 set this to 200 and if Health is less than 0 set this to 0
    setHealthDecrease(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set HealthDecrease value if value less than 0 set this to 0
    setImage(String) - Method in class Item.BaseItem
    set image item
    setImagePath(String) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set ImagePath
    setImgDown() - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set player imageDown from gameSession
    setImgDown(Image) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set ImgDown (for action move down)
    setImgLeft() - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set player imageLeft from gameSession
    setImgLeft(Image) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set ImgLeft (for action move left)
    setImgRight() - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set player imageRight from gameSession
    setImgRight(Image) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set ImgRight (for action move right)
    setImgUp() - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set player imageUp from gameSession
    setImgUp(Image) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set ImgRight (for action move up)
    setMaxUnlockedLevel(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set MaxUnlockedLevel (education) if MaxUnlockedLevel less than 0 set this to 0
    setMoney(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set StaminaDecrease value if PlayerMoney decrease less than 0 set this to 0
    setName(String) - Method in class Item.BaseItem
    set item name
    setOnActionClick(Runnable) - Method in class Screen.Game.Gamebar
    set thread Action button
    setOnLeaveBuilding(Runnable) - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set action button to Disable
    setOnReachBuilding(Runnable) - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set action button to Enable
    setOnStatusChange(Runnable) - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set status thread change while doing action
    setStage(Stage) - Method in class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Sets the main stage.
    setStamina(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set Stamina value if stamina less than 0 set this to 0
    setStaminaDecrease(int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set StaminaDecrease value if stamina decrease less than 0 set this to 0
    setType(CharacterType) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    set characterType
    Shopable - Interface in Screen.BuildingScreen
    Helper interface for popups that show a list of purchasable/selectable ShopItems.
    ShopItem - Interface in Screen.BuildingScreen
    Represents an item or action that can be shown as a button in a shop-style popup.
    show(GamePaneImage) - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Chula.ChulaPopup
    Opens the Chula window and allows the player to purchase an education level.
    show(GamePaneImage) - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Dome.DomePopup
    Opens the dome popup window and allows the player to sleep or relax.
    show(GamePaneImage) - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Gym.GymPopup
    Opens the travel gym window and allows the player to purchase a unique protein item.
    show(GamePaneImage) - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Mall.MallPopup
    Opens the mall popup window and allows the player to buy an item.
    show(GamePaneImage) - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Park.ParkPopup
    Opens the park popup window and allows the player to walk or relax.
    show(GamePaneImage) - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Restaurant.RestaurantPopup
    Opens the Restaurant popup window and allows the player to purchase a food.
    show(GamePaneImage) - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Travel.TravelPopup
    Opens the travel popup window and allows the player to select a destination.
    showChoose() - Method in class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Shows the choosing screen (character/option selection screen).
    showGame() - Method in class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Shows the main game screen.
    showHowToPlay() - Method in class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Shows the "How To Play" screen.
    showResult() - Method in class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Shows the result screen (game ending / summary).
    showTitle() - Method in class Screen.UI.ScreenManager
    Shows the title screen.
    showToast(String, String, double, double, boolean) - Static method in class Screen.UI.ToastUtil
    constructor initialize object in ToastUtil
    SoundManager - Class in Audio
    Class that Create Sound and control sound
    SoundManager() - Constructor for class Audio.SoundManager
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class Main.main
    initialize start screen to begin game
    StatusTab - Class in Screen.Game
    StatusTab on Right screen to see status of this game
    StatusTab() - Constructor for class Screen.Game.StatusTab
    constructor initialize object in StatusTab and update StatusTab when action
    stopBackground() - Static method in class Audio.SoundManager
    stop the music in game
    study(int, int) - Method in class Character.BasePlayer
    study method for decrease stamina , health , happiness but increase education stat if less than staminaCost player cant do work
